about.intro: I'm Darren Oommen, a student exploring neuroscience, medicine, data analysis, and music.
about.description: I’m a high school student interested in biomedical science, neuroscience, medicine, and computational research. I’m currently building skills in Python, NumPy, Matplotlib, and data analysis while looking for ways to connect healthcare, research, service, and real-world impact.
about.full:
Hi, I’m Darren Oommen. I’m a high school student interested in biomedical science, neuroscience, medicine, and data analysis.

I’m currently building skills in Python, NumPy, Matplotlib, statistics, and research communication. My long-term goal is to use computational tools to better understand biomedical and public health questions.

My interest in medicine and neuroscience is shaped by both academics and personal experience. I help care for my brother, who has autism, which has made me more aware of how neurological and developmental conditions affect families and communities.

I’m the co-founder and Healthcare Lead for MyIntern.net, a student internship platform where I focus on healthcare-related opportunities. I’m also volunteering at RWJ and Capital Health during summer 2026.

Outside of science, music is a major part of my life. I’ve performed as a percussionist in youth orchestra, marching band, indoor percussion, church events, weddings, and live community performances. I also started a drum tutoring / summer camp business.

I’m interested in combining science, service, leadership, music, and creativity into work that actually helps people.

roadmap.description: Freshman year at MCTS STEM Academy. Took dual-enrollment and STEM coursework including Biology, World History, Algebra II, AP Computer Science Principles, and PLTW Introduction to Engineering Design. Finished with a 4.44 weighted GPA and scored a 5 on AP Computer Science Principles.
Won Best Position Paper at Rutgers Model UN in the Disarmament and International Security Committee. Continued building interests in public policy, global issues, communication, and leadership.

Sophomore year at Hopewell Valley Central High School. Took AP Seminar, Chemistry Honors, English 2 Honors, Pre-Calculus Honors, Spanish 3, US History 1 Global Honors, Basic Piano, and Wellness. Self-studied AP Psychology and AP Calculus BC.

Co-founder and Healthcare Lead for MyIntern.net, a student internship platform. Focused primarily on finding and organizing healthcare-related internships for students interested in medicine, biomedical science, and related fields.

Volunteering at RWJ and Capital Health while continuing to build healthcare exposure. Also volunteered with special needs children at Princeton Alliance Church through summer Sundays and one-week summer camps in 2024 and 2025.

Two-year GPYO Principal Percussionist. Performed at Princeton Richardson Auditorium, Rutgers Mason Gross Performing Arts Center, Main Street Disneyland, church events, weddings, and the First FOMAA National Women’s Summit with Musify Philly. Marched bass drum, snare, and tenors across marching band and indoor percussion.

Poom belt in Taekwondo under two-time national champion Master Park. Enjoys fishing, juggling, origami, ventriloquism, and creative projects. Previously created an origami and ventriloquism YouTube channel with 52 subscribers.
